title: Tender Toasted Slovakian Pork Tenderloin Toast
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring tender pork tenderloin, served on toasted bread with a side of earthy mushrooms and cozy gravy, perfect for a comforting dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the pork tenderloin with salt and black pepper
Heat the butter in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat
Sear the pork tenderloin until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook the pork tenderloin to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit
While the pork is cooking, toast the bread slices until lightly browned
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and a pinch of salt
Add the chicken broth and heavy cream to the bowl, whisking until smooth
Bring the mixture to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat, cooking until thickened
Slice the cooked pork tenderloin and serve on top of the toasted bread, spooning the mushroom gravy over the top
